data.content:
李飞飞
Li Feifei is a researcher who studied Tibetan medicine in Tibet and later pursued academic positions at various universities.

西藏
Tibet is a region in China where Li Feifei conducted research on traditional medicine.

普林斯顿大学
Princeton University is an educational institution where Li Feifei earned her undergraduate degree.

加州理工学院
California Institute of Technology is an educational institution where Li Feifei obtained her doctoral degree.

伊利诺伊大学厄巴纳-香槟分校

普林斯顿大学计算机科学系
Princeton University Computer Science Department is a department at Princeton University where Li Feifei worked as an assistant professor.
